name: Aqualine Ltd.
summary: Aqualine Ltd. provides emergency repair services for water supply products to individual and corporate clients in Japan. It offers a range of services, including unclogging blocks in toilets, kitchens, washrooms, and bathrooms; repairing leaks; selling water supply products; pipe-laying within homes and apartments; and renovating water supply systems, as well as customer-oriented services, such as dedicated customer call centers and on-site customer visits. The company also provides mineral water under the aqua-aqua brand name; and water dispenser services. Aqualine Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Hiroshima, Japan.
